name: review
description: Stage-first standard single-review recipe: one review-only bash-capable reviewer produces structured findings, verdict, evidence, and recommended next action for the runtime task.

stages.prompt: Perform a review-only inspection of the target described in the runtime task. Do not modify files. Use bash only for non-mutating inspection commands such as git status, git diff, git diff --stat, git show, grep/find/ls, and read-only validation commands when needed. Do not install dependencies, run formatters, write files, start servers, use network/deploy commands, or execute cleanup commands. Do not quote secrets or sensitive values; summarize them if encountered. Return JSON only with summary, verdict, findings, risks, and recommendedNextAction. verdict must be one of pass, pass-with-notes, needs-fix, or blocked. Each finding must include severity, title, evidence, rationale, and recommendedAction. Use only repository evidence; if evidence is missing, say so rather than guessing.

catalog.mutationRisk: review-only bash inspection in managed worktree
